author: parithosh
content:
1D summary of the data: https://panda-uploads-production.devops-539.workers.dev/panda/uploads/987772/glamsterdam-devnet-7-24h-170mgas.html

Just at a high level, no real red flags. Most of the issues will appear when we redo this in a shadowfork with state. Until then its good to know the happy path is mostly fine. cc <@968526635735326741>

author: parithosh
content: (LLM + "use panda CLI to investigate xyz on glamsterdam-devnet-7, show me charts" is all you really need if you want to dig into the devnet data yourself as a client dev)

content: Reducing the chain load for a bit so we don't run out of storage too quickly, will cycle it a bit with time.
